title: Reorder Line Items In Quotes & Invoices

posts.author: DevonR (Devon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Hello,

Our company has been trying to start using the Monday CRM to build our quotes and invoices. However, many of our quotes are unique from each other and some can be quite complex. Currently, if we need to add a line item anywhere except the bottom of a quote, we have to rebuild the quote. Because of this, not being able to move line items and only being able to add line items at the bottom of the quote is a breaking limitation for us. Would it be possible to at least add and up and down arrow that would move the position of the line item?

What are you trying to achieve

Move line items in quotes and invoices. Also, being able to add a line item in the at any point in the quote, such as a button that would add a line item above an existing one would be nice. However, an up and down arrow would suffice and be enough of a solution for us to make Mondays Quotes & Invoices feature work for us! Also, being able to move line items in the Products widget would be huge.
